mapper.insert: INSERT INTO df_open_api_call_log ( open_api_id, api_path, task_id, execution_id, request_json, response_json, status, error_message ) VALUES ( #{openApiId}, #{apiPath}, #{taskId}, #{executionId}, #{requestJson}, #{responseJson}, #{status}, #{errorMessage} )
mapper.select:
SELECT l.id, l.open_api_id AS openApiId, a.api_name AS apiName, l.api_path AS apiPath, l.task_id AS taskId, l.execution_id AS executionId, l.request_json AS requestJson, l.response_json AS responseJson, l.status, l.error_message AS errorMessage, l.created_at AS createdAt
ORDER BY l.created_at DESC, l.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
